title: satureja simensis
intro: Satureja simensis, also known as Ethiopian savory or Ethiopian rosemary, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. It is a perennial herb native to the highlands of Ethiopia and is valued for its medicinal and culinary properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, and respiratory problems, due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, and has been shown to have antioxidant and anti-cancer effects. Satureja simensis can be prepared in various herbal forms, including tea, essential oil, and capsules, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
